zh.lifeSummary: 當Eva Grey於1205年出生在英國奧可福爾時，她的父親Sir Robert de Grey of Rotherfield21歲，母親Beatrix St Luce16歲。她於1222年與Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1245年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾享年40歲。

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Eva
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Popular Latinate form of   Eve  , used also as an Anglicization of the Irish name Aoife .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Eva Grey was born in 1205, in Oxfordshire, England, her father, Sir Robert de Grey of Rotherfield, was 21 and her mother, Beatrix St Luce, was 16. She married Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby in 1222, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1245, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eva Grey est née en 1205, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert de Grey of Rotherfield, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Beatrix St Luce, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby en 1222, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1245, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

Sie hat 1222 in England Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1245 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eva Grey è nata il nel 1205 nel Oxfordshire, England, sua padre, Sir Robert de Grey of Rotherfield, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Beatrix St Luce, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby nel 1222, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1245, nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eva Greyが1205年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Grey of Rotherfieldは21歳，母Beatrix St Luceは16歳であった。1222年にイギリスでWalter de Beke Lord of Eresbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1245年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eva Grey(이)가 1205년 영국 스퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert de Grey of Rotherfield(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrix St Luce(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1222년 영국에서 Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1245년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eva Grey nasceu em 1205, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert de Grey of Rotherfield, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix St Luce, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby em 1222, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1245, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eva Grey родилась в 1205 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert de Grey of Rotherfield было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Beatrix St Luce, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby в 1222 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1245 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.

Se casó con Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby en 1222, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1245, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años.
